title: Formation / Pace Lap
prompt: Final lap before racing. Last chance to check the setup feels right and get focused for the start. Stay focused.

title: Race Start
prompt: Race start. The season starts right now and the next few laps will set the tone for the whole race. Build from here.

title: Big Save
prompt: Massive snap right there. Feel the yaw rate hitting the limit and what it takes to pull it back. Feel that feedback.

title: Position Lost
prompt: Lost that position. That move was better than my defense and now it's response time. Chase it down.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Successfully past. The car had the pace and the moment was right — that's how passes should feel. Next target.

title: Yellow Flag
prompt: Yellow on the track. The field bunches up and everything we built in terms of gap just resets — that's racing. Race on.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Got through. That move had to be executed perfectly and it was — credit to the setup and the driving. Build on it.

title: Personal Best Lap
prompt: That's it — personal best. That lap felt fast and the timer confirms it — build on this feeling.
